fields.title: Define AgentDefinition type and .md parser
fields.description:
Create TypeScript types and parser for agent .md files.

## Deliverables
1. AgentDefinition interface with fields from codex frontmatter:
   - name: string
   - description: string  
   - model?: string (inherit | explicit)
   - thinking?: ThinkingLevel
   - sandbox: SandboxConfig (filesystemMode, networkMode, approvalPolicy)
   
2. Parser function: parseAgentDefinition(content: string) -> AgentDefinition
   - Extract YAML frontmatter (--- delimited)
   - Parse frontmatter as metadata
   - Body after frontmatter is systemPrompt

3. Loader function: loadAgentDefinition(name: string, cwd: string)
   - Search paths: project .pi/agents/, user ~/.pi/agent/agents/, extension bundled
   
## Reference
- Codex frontmatter: name, description, model, reasoning_effort, sandbox_policy, approval_policy, allowed_subagents
- Tau sandbox config: filesystemMode, networkMode, approvalPolicy
fields.close_reason: Implemented AgentDefinition and .md parser with tests.
